title: Animals And The Stars
content:
Crickets are a strange place,
        cricks of dew hemmed
        with hoar-frost
        mushrooming by a door.

        The glens are fashions of a loom
        eerie pads
        are nightly rooms.

        The padlocks
        remove the key
        as grass-hoppers
        keep the meadow free.

        A twilight world
        along the edge
        at rapier's length
        this light, this point
        at end of the void.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Animals And The Stars"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
